nasb.text: If a man walking after wind and falsehood Had told lies and said, ‘I will speak out to you concerning wine and liquor,’ He would be spokesman to this people.

esv.text: If a man should go about and utter wind and lies, saying, “I will preach to you of wine and strong drink,” he would be the preacher for this people!

cnv.text: 若有人隨從虛假的心， 撒謊說： “我要向你們說清酒和烈酒的預言。” 那人就是這民的預言家了。

ccb.text: 倘若有骗子撒谎说， ‘我预言你们会有美酒佳酿。’ 他就会成为这个民族的先知。
